title: ai-archi architecture IR
description: Input for renderers/render-architecture.mjs. Grid cells, not pixels: col picks the tier (x = 60 + col*240), row the lane (y = 120 + row*100). The renderer computes all geometry, routes edges orthogonally, fans parallel edges, inlines icons from the asset libraries, and wires up flow animation + the step player.

accent.description: Colors the boundary, e.g. security for a PII boundary

row.description: Lane, top to bottom; fractions allowed

icon.description: Asset-library icon id (see assets/INDEX.md); defaults to the category glyph

width.description: Override the 168px default when a label needs room (max 200 per column)

label.description: Only for cross-boundary or non-obvious hops

step.description: Position in the step-player narration; steps must be contiguous from 1

flow.description: Marching-dash overlay; defaults to true on stepped edges

packet.description: Dot traveling the path; use on 2-4 primary edges max

accent.description: Color override; defaults to the target node's category

labelDy.description: Vertical label nudge when the validator reports a collision
